name: Atlantic Avenue
description: Delray Beach's celebrated main street — dining, galleries, boutiques, and nightlife within a one-block walk.

name: Delray Beach
description: One of Florida's finest Blue Wave beaches — a 5-minute walk from your front door.

name: Lionfish
description: Award-winning modern seafood restaurant, one of Delray's most celebrated dining destinations.

name: Deck 84
description: Waterfront dining on the Intracoastal with an elevated menu and stunning sunset views.

name: Dada
description: Delray's most atmospheric dining experience — a landmark 1920s house with an acclaimed seasonal menu and lush garden bar.

name: Hurricane Alley
description: Beloved raw bar and seafood house on Atlantic Avenue — a Delray institution since 1991.

name: Le Jardin
description: French-inspired garden restaurant with European sensibility and al fresco dining on Atlantic Avenue.

name: The Ray Hotel
description: Boutique luxury hotel in the heart of downtown Delray Beach — home to rooftop dining and a vibrant social scene.

name: The Colony Hotel
description: Delray Beach's iconic pink landmark hotel since 1926 — a historic seaside retreat steps from the beach.

name: Boca Raton Resort & Club
description: The iconic five-star resort — golf, spa, beach club, and world-class dining minutes south.

name: SoulCycle Delray
description: The premier fitness studio on Atlantic Avenue, steps from Casa Avenida.

name: Delray Beach Tennis Center
description: World-class tennis facility hosting ATP and WTA events — 14 clay courts and stadium court available to residents.

name: Equinox Boca Raton
description: Luxury fitness club with full spa amenities in Boca Raton.

name: Whole Foods Market
description: Premium grocery and specialty foods, a short drive west of downtown.

name: Trader Joe's
description: Popular specialty grocer with organic and artisan selections — easy access from downtown Delray.

name: Old School Square
description: Delray's beloved cultural campus — concert pavilion, galleries, and community events in a restored 1913 schoolhouse.

name: Palm Beach Intl Airport
description: International airport serving Palm Beach County with direct flights to major US and international destinations.
